data.title: G7 May Address North Korea’s Crypto Thefts at June Summit
data.description:
Leaders of the Group of Seven (G7) are expected to raise the issue of North Korea’s growing cyberattacks and cryptocurrency thefts at their upcoming summit.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/g7-may-address-north-koreas-crypto-thefts-at-june-summit/

data.title: Ethereum Governance Process Proposed for Improvement
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ethereum core developer Tim Beiko has introduced a proposal aimed at enhancing the governance process of Ethereum. The proposal focuses on optimizing the selection of hard fork 'flagship features.' Key elements of the proposal include defining clear fork objectives, limiting each layer to a maximum of one flagship feature, employing a 'barbell' strategy to strengthen community feedback, formalizing working groups, and documenting the governance process. This initiative seeks to improve transparency and decision-making legitimacy while maintaining Ethereum's community-driven nature.

data.title: Monad Testnet Sees Decline in Daily Active Accounts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain data reveals a significant drop in the daily active accounts on the Monad testnet since the beginning of May. The number of active accounts peaked at 9.77 million on April 30, but in the past five days, this figure has stabilized around 1 million.

data.title: Governor Hobbs greenlights Arizona’s Bitcoin reserve fund after signing HB-2749 into law
data.description:
Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs signed a bill into law allowing the U. S. state to keep unclaimed crypto and establish a 'Bitcoin Reserve Fund' not using taxpayers’ funds.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arizonas-bitcoin-reserve-fund/

data.title: Ethereum activates Pectra upgrade: all the information you need
data.description:

data.title: BounceBit announces its product plan for the second half of the year and will launch a number of innovative features at the intersection of CeFi and DeFi
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BounceBit announced that its V3 product matrix has entered the construction stage. In the second half of the year, it will focus on launching functions such as contract trading, intention-based lending, and structured products, and will simultaneously upgrade BounceBit Chain to support high-frequency financial application scenarios. Officials said that V3 will focus on the integration path of CeFi and DeFi, including cooperating with Durian to launch a contract trading module that supports CEX credit market making, and an order book lending and strategy matching system designed with reference to the Bitfinex model. BB tokens will play a role in fee reduction, matching efficiency, and product pricing.

data.title: Bitcoin Addresses Linked to LockBit Ransomware Leaked in Major Breach
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, nearly 60,000 Bitcoin addresses associated with LockBit's ransomware infrastructure have been exposed following a breach of the group's dark web affiliate panel. This leak included a MySQL database dump shared publicly online, containing crypto-related information that could aid blockchain analysts in tracing the group's illicit financial activities.

Ransomware, a type of malware used by cybercriminals, locks files or computer systems, rendering them inaccessible. Attackers typically demand ransom payments, often in digital assets like Bitcoin (BTC), in exchange for decryption keys to unlock the files. LockBit is recognized as one of the most notorious crypto ransomware groups. In February 2024, a joint operation involving ten countries aimed to disrupt the group, citing billions in damages to critical infrastructure.

Despite the leak of nearly 60,000 Bitcoin wallets, no private keys were compromised. A conversation shared by an X user with a LockBit operator confirmed the breach, but LockBit personnel assured that no private keys or data were lost. Analysts at Bleeping Computer noted that the database contained twenty tables, including a "builds" table with individual ransomware builds created by the organization's affiliates. The data also included some target companies for these builds.

Additionally, the leaked database featured a "chats" table, which contained over 4,400 negotiation messages between victims and the ransomware organization. The breach's origins remain unclear, but Bleeping Computer analysts suggested a possible connection to the Everest ransomware site breach, as the message used in both incidents matched.

This breach underscores the significant role of cryptocurrency in the ransomware economy. Victims are typically assigned an address to pay their ransom, enabling affiliates to monitor payments while attempting to obscure links to their main wallets. The exposure of these addresses provides law enforcement and blockchain investigators with the opportunity to track patterns and potentially connect past ransom payments to known wallets.

data.title: Bitcoin Adoption Grows Among Nations and Institutions, Says CEO
data.description:
According to PANews, Bitcoin Magazine CEO David Bailey highlighted the increasing adoption of Bitcoin by countries and institutions during a recent interview. He shared data indicating that approximately 50 countries are now involved in Bitcoin mining through public-private partnerships. Some nations have achieved mining scales of several hundred megawatts or even gigawatts. For instance, Bhutan's Bitcoin mining revenue now accounts for over 50% of its GDP.

Bailey also predicted that more sovereign nations would purchase Bitcoin through sovereign wealth funds or other means this year. Currently, around 700,000 Bitcoins are held by Bitcoin-related securities, a figure that is expected to rise significantly.

Furthermore, Bailey noted that companies like MicroStrategy are increasingly adopting asset securitization strategies to acquire Bitcoin. Approximately 200 companies have already implemented similar strategies, and this trend is anticipated to expand further in the future.

data.title: Bithumb announces the launch of Particle Network (PARTI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bithumb has added Particle Network (PARTI) Korean won trading pair, and trading will start at 4 pm on May 8th, Beijing time.

data.title: Sei Proposes EVM-Only Future to Simplify Network
data.description:
Supporting both EVM and CosmWasm has helped attract a wide range of users and developers. But this dual-architecture approach has also created serious headaches. A new proposal suggests streamlining Sei into a fully EVM-based chain. The goal is to reduce developer pain, infrastructure complexity, and user confusion
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/sei-proposes-evm-only-future-to-simplify-network/

data.title: Upbit announces the launch of TIA Korean Won trading pair and IO/USDT trading pair
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Upbit, the platform has launched Celestia (TIA) and Ionet (IO) trading pairs. Among them, TIA supports KRW, BTC and USDT market transactions, and IO supports BTC and USDT markets. Users can conduct spot transactions in the corresponding markets.

data.title: Swedish Central Bank Maintains Policy Rate at 2.25%
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Swedish central bank has decided to keep its policy interest rate unchanged at 2.25%. This decision aligns with market expectations, which also anticipated the rate to remain at 2.25%. The bank's move reflects its ongoing assessment of economic conditions and monetary policy requirements.

data.title: Whales have accumulated more than 3.7 million PENDLE tokens, with a profit of $1.55 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, since the end of March, a whale or institution has been withdrawing and hoarding PENDLE from Binance through multiple addresses. In just half an hour, the address withdrew 538,000 PENDLE again, which is equivalent to about 1.83 million US dollars at the current price. Over the past month, it has accumulated 3.702 million PENDLE through 6 addresses, with a total cost of about 11.04 million US dollars, and a current floating profit of 1.55 million US dollars, with an overall yield of about 14%.

data.title: Crypto Portfolio Management: Diversification and Risk Strategies
data.description:
Managing a crypto portfolio might sound like something only finance nerds or day traders worry about—but it’s actually for anyone who owns more than one type of crypto. Think of it like building a team in a game: you want different strengths, solid backups, and a strategy that keeps you from losing everything in one bad move. In crypto, prices can jump or drop in minutes, so having a plan matters. That’s where portfolio management comes in—it’s how you balance your coins, avoid putting all your hopes into one token, and protect your digital stash from wild market swings
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/05/08/crypto-portfolio-management-diversification-and-risk-strategies/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=crypto-portfolio-management-diversification-and-risk-strategies

data.title: Analysts Say $2,500,000,000,000 ‘Avalanche’ of Selling Could Hit US Dollar, Warn Trade Wars Threatening Greenback’s Appeal: Report
data.description:
The US dollar could suffer a major sell-off by Asian investors and exporters triggered by trade tensions, according to a pair of macroeconomic and currency strategists.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/08/us-dollar-to-face-2500000000000-avalanche-of-selling-by-asian-investors-as-greenback-enters-vulnerable-position-report/

data.title: Market Trends Indicate Bullish Sentiment in Cryptocurrency Trading
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the funding rates on major centralized and decentralized exchanges currently suggest a bullish trend in the market. The funding rates for key cryptocurrencies are detailed in the accompanying chart.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain a balance between contract prices and the prices of the underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging this fee, to adjust the cost or profit of holding contracts, ensuring that contract prices remain close to the underlying asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% indicates a baseline rate. When the funding rate exceeds 0.01%, it signifies a general bullish sentiment in the market. Conversely, a funding rate below 0.005% indicates a bearish sentiment.

data.title: Flare Network’s total value locked surges 160% since USDT0 rollout, surpassing $120 million
data.description:
